case_title: ELIZABETH SUSIE WHITE VS. CAPITAL DELELOPMENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WHITE, ELIZABETH SUSIE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL DELELOPMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, ELIZABETH SUSIE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, ELIZABETH SUSIE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL DELELOPMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-18-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL DELELOPMENT
CHALLENGE TO VENUE, NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL DELELOPMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF WHITE, ELIZABETH SUSIE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2009 - CONTINUED TO APR-30-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED. BASED UPON EVIDENCE BY BOTH DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES WAS NEGOTIATED AND ENTERED INTO IN SAN FRANCISCO. THUS, THE MATTER IS PROPERLY VENUED IN SAN FRANCISCO. TRIAL IS STE FOR APRIL 16, 2009 AT 3:30 PM. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, ELIZABETH SUSIE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL DELELOPMENT CLAIM HEARING OF APR-30-2009 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
